creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to ayan from comment #15)
I think I may have been mistaken in the past.  Possibly, there were packages installed that pulled dependencies that appeased shotcut.

Adding both qt5-graphicaleffects and qt5-quickcontrols to the run dependencies is enough to give a timeline.  Installing those packages manually may be enough to test if that helps.
